rulings.Case Title: THE VERLIS BROWN SMITH LIVING TRUST DATED DECEMBER 22,2000
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Compelling Joinder Of Barbara De Vries, Administrator; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: The Motion for Order Compelling Joinder of Barbara DeVries is granted, no opposition having been filed. Ms. DeVries has an interest in this action and is entitled to become a party. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, September 26, 2012.
